text: Our team is extremely frustrated with the PDF export functionality. Whenever we try to export reports with more than 50 pages, the request consistently times out with a 504 error. This is blocking our weekly executive reviews, and if not resolved by next week, we will have to look at alternative solutions since reporting is a core requirement for our compliance department.

I really love the analytics tool, but it's super hard to use at night. There is no dark mode setting! It's blindingly bright. Can you guys please add a toggle for dark mode? All the modern web apps have this. It makes a huge difference for late-night productivity.

I decided to cancel my trial because I couldn't even finish signing up. The onboarding email verification kept failing with domain validation errors for our email domain. I tried contacting support but got no response. If onboarding is this buggy, I can't trust the rest of your system with our company data. Moving to a competitor.
